# pangolin_rule (Resource)

Manages a rule for a resource.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `action` (String) The action to perform for the match.
- `match` (String) What category to match on.
- `priority` (Number) The priority to evaluate the rules. Lower number is evaluated first.
- `resource_id` (Number) The ID of the resource this target belongs to.
- `value` (String) The value to match.

### Optional

- `enabled` (Boolean)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
